titleStmt.title: SII 27.83: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 83. (A.R. No. 341 of 1940-41.) PEDDAPASUPULA, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab in Survey No. 1033, 2-(1/2) miles to the south of the village.

This slightly worn out record registers a gift of land situated in the village Hiriya-Pasupula in Mulike-nāḍu and bordering the village Dānavanahāḷu, by Vīra Dēvarāya oḍeya to Rāyasada Viṭhappa, son of karaṇika Ādeppa of Kāśyapa-gōtra and Ṛik-śākha.

It is dated Śaka 1304 (expressed in words), Māgha ba. 30, Monday, solar eclipse corresponding to 1383 A.D., February 2. But the eclipse did not occur on that day. However, this date is too early for Dēvarāya I. If we surmise that the year is a mistake for Śaka 1364 then the other given details do not tally, the tithi occurring on Thursday, January 31 of 1443 A.D. falling in the reign period of Dēvarāya II when the eclipse also did not occur. It may be perhaps a gift made by Dēvarāya I as a prince while Harihara II was ruling.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī
svasti śrī jayābda śakavarṣa
sāvirada mūnūṟa nālkaneya
duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada māgha ba 30 sō
sūryyagrahāṇa puṁṇyakāladalu vi
rūpākṣadēvara saṁnidhiyalu śrīvīra
dēvarāya Oḍeyaru ruku śākhādhyā
yada kāśyapagōtrada karaṇika Āde
ppagaḷa makkaḷu rāyasada viṭhappaga
ḷige mulikeyanāḍa Oḷagaṇa hiri
ya pasapulada ṇa holadoḷage
dānavanahāḷa hādiyamūḍaṇa dā
navanahāḷa holamēreya mo
mū khaṁḍuga yeraḍu kṣe
travanū dhārāpūrvvakavāgi sa

sarvamānyavāgi Ā caṁdrā
rkka sthāi Āgi koṭṭa .
nisu dānapālanayōrmmadhyē
dānāchrēyōnu pālanaṁ dānātsvargga
mavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ
Digital edition of SII 27.83 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
